// Entry point
import React from "react";

import { RouterProvider } from "@tanstack/react-router";
import { createHashHistory, createBrowserHistory } from "@tanstack/react-router";
import "@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css";

**Location:** `/packages/shared/`

{

export function getModelOptions(provider: ProviderKind = "codex")

### 6. Local Storage Usage Patterns

1. **Theme Storage (`/apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`):**

- Versioning for schema evolution
- Try-catch error handling to not break UX
- Used for: theme, settings, state, drafts

**Hook: `/apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`**

- `theme`: "light" | "dark" | "system"
- `resolvedTheme`: "light" | "dark" (computed)
- `setTheme(next: Theme)`: saves to localStorage, applies to DOM, emits change
- Listens to system preference changes via matchMedia
- Listens to storage events (other tabs)
- Suppresses transitions during theme changes using `.no-transitions` class

   - Diff worker pool via `DiffWorkerPoolProvider`

**Web App Entry:**
- `/apps/web/src/main.tsx` - React entry
- `/apps/web/index.html` - HTML template
- `/apps/web/src/index.css` - Global Tailwind styles
- `/apps/web/src/router.ts` - Router with providers

**Root Component:**
- `/apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx` - Root route with error boundary

**State Management:**
- `/apps/web/src/store.ts` - Zustand app store
- `/apps/web/src/appSettings.ts` - Settings store
- `/apps/web/src/composerDraftStore.ts` - Draft store
- `/apps/web/src/terminalStateStore.ts` - Terminal state

**Theme:**

- `/apps/web/src/index.css` - Theme CSS variables

**UI Components:**

- `/apps/web/src/components/Sidebar.tsx` - Main sidebar
- `/apps/web/src/components/ChatView.tsx` - Chat interface
- `/apps/web/src/components/DiffPanel.tsx` - Diff viewer

**Shared Packages:**
- `/packages/shared/package.json` - Exports definition
- `/packages/shared/src/model.ts` - Model utilities
- `/packages/contracts/src/` - TypeScript contracts

**Build Config:**
- `/apps/web/vite.config.ts` - Vite + Tailwind config
- `/apps/web/package.json` - Dependencies (React 19, TanStack Router, React Query, Tailwind 4)
- `/tsconfig.base.json` - Base TypeScript config

### 10. Technology Stack Summary

**Web App:**
- **Frontend Framework:** React 19 with TanStack Router for file-based routing
- **State Management:** Zustand (client state) + React Query (server state)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 4 + @tailwindcss/vite with CSS custom properties
- **UI Components:** Custom built with class-variance-authority, @base-ui/react
- **Editor:** Lexical (rich text editor)
- **Terminal:** xterm (browser terminal)
- **Diff Rendering:** @pierre/diffs with Web Workers
- **Build Tool:** Vite 8 with React compiler plugin

**Shared Packages:**
- **Type System:** Effect library for schemas
- **Build:** tsdown for cross-format builds (ESM + CJS)
- **Testing:** Vitest

**Monorepo:**
- **Package Manager:** Bun
- **Workspaces:** Bun workspaces with catalog versions
- **Build Orchestration:** Turbo
- **Linting:** oxlint
- **Formatting:** oxfmt

This is a sophisticated, modern TypeScript monorepo with strong separation of concerns, comprehensive state management patterns, and a cohesive design system built on Tailwind CSS 4 with custom CSS properties.

# Custom Theme System for T3 Code ## Context T3 Code currently has a minimal light/dark/system toggle stored in localStorage as `"t3code:theme"`. `) — mirror for ThemeSelector --- ## Verification 1. **TypeScript**: Run `bun typecheck` in root — all packages must pass. - Replace Appearance section content with `<ThemeSelector />`

**Step 6 — `apps/web/src/index.css`**
- Add fallback `:root` values for the 6 new CSS vars so they exist before JS loads

Pure TypeScript theme definitions live in `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` (no runtime deps, no Effect). 2. `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` is **rewritten** to consume these types, apply CSS custom properties, and return `{ theme: Theme, setTheme, availableThemes, resolvedTheme }`. 3. A new `ThemeSelector` component renders swatch-based radio buttons. 4. The Settings page Appearance section is updated to use `ThemeSelector`. 5. CSS fallback vars for the new slots are added to `index.css`. 6. `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` continues to work unchanged — it already uses `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` which we preserve. --- ## accent: string; sidebar: string; editor: string; terminal: string; statusBar: string; } export interface Theme { id: string; name: string; colorScheme: "light" | "dark"; // drives .dark class + resolvedTheme colors: ThemeColors; fontFamily: string; fontSize: number; } const BUILT_IN_THEMES: readonly Theme[] = [ { id: "t3-dark", name: "T3 Dark", colorScheme: "dark", colors: { background: ---

## What was implemented

### `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` *(new)*
Defines `ThemeColors` and `Theme` interfaces, plus three built-in themes using concrete `oklch()` color values. Exports `getTheme(id)` and `listThemes()`. No runtime dependencies — pure TypeScript.

### `packages/shared/package.json`
Added `"./themes"` subpath export alongside the existing `./model`, `./git`, etc. entries.

### `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(rewritten)*
- Imports `Theme`, `getTheme`, `listThemes` from `@t3tools/shared/themes`
- `applyTheme()` now sets CSS custom properties directly on `document.documentElement`: maps `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`/`--ring` from theme colors; adds new `--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-status-bar`, `--theme-font-family`, `--theme-font-size`; toggles `.dark` class and `color-scheme` based on `colorScheme`
- Returns `{ theme: Theme, setTheme(id), availableThemes, resolvedTheme: "light"|"dark" }` — `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` is fully backward-compatible via `resolvedTheme`
- localStorage migration is silent: any unknown stored value (old "light"/"dark"/"system") falls back to `"t3-dark"`

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Radio-group component with one button per theme showing three color swatch dots (background, accent, sidebar) plus the theme name and color scheme label. Mirrors the visual style of the old settings radio buttons exactly.

### `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`
- Removed `THEME_OPTIONS` constant and the old `{THEME_OPTIONS.map(...)}` radio group
- Removed `useTheme` import and destructure
- Replaced the Appearance section body with `<ThemeSelector />`

### `apps/web/src/index.css`
Added six `:root` fallback variables (`--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-status-bar`, `--theme-font-family`, `--theme-font-size`) so they exist before JS executes, defaulting to t3-dark values.

---

## What was implemented

### `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` *(new)*
Defines `ThemeColors` and `Theme` interfaces, plus three built-in themes using concrete `oklch()` color values. Exports `getTheme(id)` and `listThemes()`. No runtime dependencies — pure TypeScript.

### `packages/shared/package.json`
Added `"./themes"` subpath export alongside the existing `./model`, `./git`, etc. entries.

### `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(rewritten)*
- Imports `Theme`, `getTheme`, `listThemes` from `@t3tools/shared/themes`
- `applyTheme()` now sets CSS custom properties directly on `document.documentElement`: maps `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`/`--ring` from theme colors; adds new `--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-status-bar`, `--theme-font-family`, `--theme-font-size`; toggles `.dark` class and `color-scheme` based on `colorScheme`
- Returns `{ theme: Theme, setTheme(id), availableThemes, resolvedTheme: "light"|"dark" }` — `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` is fully backward-compatible via `resolvedTheme`
- localStorage migration is silent: any unknown stored value (old "light"/"dark"/"system") falls back to `"t3-dark"`

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Radio-group component with one button per theme showing three color swatch dots (background, accent, sidebar) plus the theme name and color scheme label. Mirrors the visual style of the old settings radio buttons exactly.

### `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`
- Removed `THEME_OPTIONS` constant and the old `{THEME_OPTIONS.map(...)}` radio group
- Removed `useTheme` import and destructure
- Replaced the Appearance section body with `<ThemeSelector />`

### `apps/web/src/index.css`
Added six `:root` fallback variables (`--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-status-bar`, `--theme-font-family`, `--theme-font-size`) so they exist before JS executes, defaulting to t3-dark values.
